sections.paragraph:
-

(1) to break, or dash in pieces. (Arab. رضح and رضخ.) See Piel No. 1, and the noun רֵצַח.

(2) to kill, with an acc. Num 35:6, seqq.; more fully רָצַח פּ׳ נֶפֶשׁ Deu 22:26, compare הִכָּה פ׳ נֶפֶשׁ under the word הִכָּה No. 2, c.

Niphal, pass. of Kal No. 2, Jud. 20:4 .

Piel-

(1) to dash in pieces, Psa 62:4.

(2) i.q. Kal No. 2, but iteratively (like קַטֵּל), to kill many, to act the homicide, 2Ki 6:32 Isa 1:21 Hos 6:9.
